verses.text: Aaron and his sons are set apart as priests, with holy garments 'for glory and for beauty.' The priesthood. God appoints men to serve Him.
Aaron and his sons are set apart as priests, with holy garments 'for glory and for beauty.' The priesthood. God appoints men to serve Him.
Wise-hearted men make the garments of gold, blue, and fine linen. The makers. Skill is given for God's service.
Wise-hearted men make the garments of gold, blue, and fine linen. The makers. Skill is given for God's service.
Wise-hearted men make the garments of gold, blue, and fine linen. The makers. Skill is given for God's service.
The ephod is made of gold and fine linen, with two onyx stones. The ephod. The priest's chief garment is wrought.
The ephod is made of gold and fine linen, with two onyx stones. The ephod. The priest's chief garment is wrought.
The ephod is made of gold and fine linen, with two onyx stones. The ephod. The priest's chief garment is wrought.
The ephod is made of gold and fine linen, with two onyx stones. The ephod. The priest's chief garment is wrought.
The names of Israel's tribes are graven on the shoulder stones. On the shoulders. The priest bears the people before God.
The names of Israel's tribes are graven on the shoulder stones. On the shoulders. The priest bears the people before God.
The names of Israel's tribes are graven on the shoulder stones. On the shoulders. The priest bears the people before God.
The names of Israel's tribes are graven on the shoulder stones. On the shoulders. The priest bears the people before God.
The names of Israel's tribes are graven on the shoulder stones. On the shoulders. The priest bears the people before God.
The breastplate of judgment is made, set with rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
The breastplate of judgment is made, set with rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
The breastplate of judgment is made, set with rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
The breastplate of judgment is made, set with rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
Twelve stones, each engraved with a tribe's name. Twelve names. Each tribe has its place before God.
Twelve stones, each engraved with a tribe's name. Twelve names. Each tribe has its place before God.
Twelve stones, each engraved with a tribe's name. Twelve names. Each tribe has its place before God.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is firmly attached.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is firmly attached.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is firmly attached.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is firmly attached.
Rings and a lace of blue bind it, that it be not loosed. Secured. It rests close upon the ephod.
Rings and a lace of blue bind it, that it be not loosed. Secured. It rests close upon the ephod.
Rings and a lace of blue bind it, that it be not loosed. Secured. It rests close upon the ephod.
Aaron bears their names on his heart, with the Urim and Thummim. On the heart. The priest carries the people in love.
Aaron bears their names on his heart, with the Urim and Thummim. On the heart. The priest carries the people in love.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates, that his sound be heard. The robe. His ministry is marked as he enters.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates, that his sound be heard. The robe. His ministry is marked as he enters.

A golden plate, 'HOLINESS TO THE LORD,' is set on his mitre. Holiness. The priest bears the holiness God requires.
A golden plate, 'HOLINESS TO THE LORD,' is set on his mitre. Holiness. The priest bears the holiness God requires.
A golden plate, 'HOLINESS TO THE LORD,' is set on his mitre. Holiness. The priest bears the holiness God requires.
Coats, girdles, and linen breeches are made for Aaron and his sons. Clothed. The priests are fully arrayed to serve.
